what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-15 in the design-source channel, declaring it as SOURCE design ground-truth for presentation-15p/p-15.jpg.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address image://design-source/presentation-15p/p-15, channel design-source, path, blob URI, mime image/jpeg, name p-15
Width and height are both set to 0
source field is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-15.jpg'
standouts: Explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
Uses a blob:// URI for content addressing
Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg record
concerns: w and h are 0, which is unusual for an image record
No links to related assets or derivations
No alt text, caption, or content description of the image
notes: A minimal provenance stub for a design-source presentation image, flagged as ground truth but missing resolved dimensions and relationships.
questions: What visual content does p-15.jpg contain?
How does this asset relate to the other presentation-15p pages?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design-source ground-truth image asset; it does that as a metadata stub, but it does not provide image content, dimensions, or descriptive details.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish a stable, attributable ledger entry for a presentation image so the asset can be referenced and fused as a canonical source artifact.
novelty: The combination of an explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label with a blob-addressed image record in a markdown ledger file.
contribution: Contributes a stable identifier, content address, and provenance metadata for one design-source image asset, which a fused system can use to locate, attribute, and reason about the source image.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown ledger record for a JPEG image asset named p-15 in the design-source channel, tagged as SOURCE design ground-truth, with a blob URI, zero dimensions, and empty links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide provenance for a single design-source presentation image so it can be referenced as a ground-truth asset.
